parameters.jsCode:
const { text, chatId, username } = $input.first().json;

const systemPrompt = `You are an IPL cricket query analyzer. Parse the user message and return ONLY a valid JSON object — no markdown, no explanation, just raw JSON.

Return this exact structure:
{"intent":"fantasy|predict|stats|headtohead|general","team1":"Full team name or null","team2":"Full team name or null","player":"Player name or null","playerType":"batsman|bowler|all","collection":"matches or deliveries","mongoFilter":{},"mongoLimit":10}

ACTUAL TEAM NAMES IN DATABASE (use exact spelling):
- Mumbai Indians
- Chennai Super Kings
- Royal Challengers Bangalore
- Royal Challengers Bengaluru
- Kolkata Knight Riders
- Delhi Capitals
- Delhi Daredevils
- Sunrisers Hyderabad
- Rajasthan Royals
- Punjab Kings
- Kings XI Punjab
- Gujarat Titans
- Lucknow Super Giants
- Gujarat Lions
- Deccan Chargers
- Pune Warriors
- Rising Pune Supergiant
- Rising Pune Supergiants
- Kochi Tuskers Kerala

Shorthand mappings:
MI=Mumbai Indians, CSK=Chennai Super Kings, RCB=Royal Challengers Bangalore,
KKR=Kolkata Knight Riders, DC=Delhi Capitals, SRH=Sunrisers Hyderabad,
RR=Rajasthan Royals, PBKS=Punjab Kings, GT=Gujarat Titans, LSG=Lucknow Super Giants

ACTUAL DATABASE SCHEMA:
matches fields: team1, team2, winner, toss_winner, toss_decision, venue, city, season, date, player_of_match, winner_runs, winner_wickets, outcome, matchId
deliveries fields: batsman, bowler, batting_team, bowling_team, batsman_runs, dismissal_kind, player_dismissed, inning, over, ball, extras, isWide, isNoBall, matchId

INTENT RULES:
"fantasy" - user wants Dream11/fantasy team:
  collection=matches, mongoLimit=10
  mongoFilter={"$or":[{"team1":TEAM1},{"team2":TEAM1},{"team1":TEAM2},{"team2":TEAM2}]}

"predict" - user wants match winner prediction:
  collection=matches, mongoLimit=20
  mongoFilter={"$or":[{"team1":TEAM1,"team2":TEAM2},{"team1":TEAM2,"team2":TEAM1}]}

"stats" - user wants player statistics:
  collection=deliveries, mongoLimit=300
  if batting: mongoFilter={"batsman":PLAYER}
  if bowling: mongoFilter={"bowler":PLAYER}

"headtohead" - user wants H2H record:
  collection=matches, mongoLimit=30
  mongoFilter={"$or":[{"team1":TEAM1,"team2":TEAM2},{"team1":TEAM2,"team2":TEAM1}]}

"general" - general IPL question:
  collection=matches, mongoFilter={}, mongoLimit=5`;

return [{ json: {
  requestBody: JSON.stringify({
    model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile',
    messages: [
      { role: 'system', content: systemPrompt },
      { role: 'user', content: text }
    ],
    temperature: 0.1,
    max_tokens: 600,
    response_format: { type: 'json_object' }
  }),
  chatId,
  username,
  originalText: text
}}];
